videos.title: If you're working on a college or job application, think about this: what makes you uniquely you?

videos.description: If you're working on a college or job application, think about this: what makes you uniquely you? Rachel discusses this with Quincy on the freeCodeCamp podcast.

videos.title: Web Scraping for Beginners –  Extract Data with an API
videos.author: freeCodeCamp.org
videos.description: Learn how web scraping can be utilized for tasks like market research, SEO tracking, and data collection. She will demonstrate how to bypass common obstacles like CAPTCHAs, rate limits, and bot detection by leveraging an efficient API. By the end, you'll learn how to build a simple, effective scrape

videos.title: Back in 2004, email seemed like a solved problem. But an engineer at Google had different ideas...
videos.author: freeCodeCamp.org
videos.description: Back in 2004, email seemed like a solved problem. But an engineer at Google had different ideas...here, Ania tells you about how Gmail was created.
